channel.title: LuxeMia - Indian Ethnic Wear
channel.description: Shop quality Indian ethnic wear - bridal lehengas, wedding sarees, sherwanis, anarkali suits, and jewelry at LuxeMia. Flat rate shipping $25 per order, free on orders over $350.

item.g:title: Yellow Net Thread Occasion Lehenga Choli - Designer Indian Lehenga
item.g:description: An elegant yellow net lehenga choli crafted with intricate thread work, designed for the modern Indian bride. Pair this designer lehenga with statement jewellery for parties, family functions & special occasions. Color: Yellow Fabric: Net Work: Thread Work Occasion: Occasional Stitching: Unstitched, Ready to Wear or Made to Measure Type Lehenga Choli Color Yellow Fabric Net Work Thread Work Occasion Occasional Sizes 32 - 48 (XS to XXL) Care Dry clean only Shipping Worldwide - free over $350 Stitching OptionsReady to Wear: Pre-stitched to standard sizes (32-48). Just pick your size and wear.Made to Measure: Stitched to your exact body measurements. We'll email you a measurement form after checkout.Unstitched: You receive the fabric and trims to stitch with your own tailor.
